title: Understanding the legal framework of food licensing in India
description: In this ‘Leading Questions’ section, Janini Somiah and Anvita Harish discuss FSSAI’s food licensing framework - which requires every food business to obtain registration or a licence (one per premise) - and outline the 2026 amendments that make licences perpetual.Question: What should the foundation of your food business be, before undertaking any operations?Answer: The laws surrounding food safety in the country require every person who deals with food and undertakes any activity related t
